snippets.comment: She is fair with her grading. Be ready to learn and pay attention in her lectures. I took her Math 219 Saturday course. Gives several 15 minute breaks and would usually let us out early. It is a 4 hour class!
It was a 4 hour class. Only 5 minutes breaks every 2 hours. Would continue the lecture after an exam. Would not let you out early. Do not take her!

Summer  harder. She does more than just teach the material well, she really connects with the students and wants to make sure you learn. She expects you to work and study for your grade. Don't slack off and pay attention to lectures and do the homework. On the exams keep your work neat as she does g
